channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham passes away after short, unexpected illness
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, a key ally of President Trump known for advocating a strong foreign policy, has died.

item.title: When the U.S. Advocates for Political Prisoners Around the World, Freedom Wins
item.description: Pastor Ezra Jin's story shows that American power can still be used to advance human freedom.

item.title: The Genius of the U.S. Constitution
item.description: The Founders understood that freedom is the foundation for dignity and prosperity.

item.title: Africa's Hypocritical Reparations Demand
item.description: The historical record on slavery involves nations far beyond the West.
